title: IN-HOME PARENT SUPPORT, PARENTING GROUPS, SUPERVISED VISITATION, AND ODHS SERVICES - 211info
text: FAMILY SKILL BUILDERS IN-HOME PARENT SUPPORT, PARENTING GROUPS, SUPERVISED VISITATION, AND ODHS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides strategies to improve parent-child interactions. Services include parent education, small parent groups, resource information, and supervised child visitation. Also provides parent support groups for parents with intellectual disabilities. Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-18; specific program requirements vary Supervised child visitation: Court or ODHS order required; self-referral Clackamas County only Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 442-2296 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 442-2296 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or complete a referral form at https://familyskillbuilders.org/contact-us FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: Amharic, ASL, English, Ga, Spanish, Ga, Twi AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Parental Visitation Facilitation Parental Visitation Facilitation * Parents of Children in Foster Care Parenting Skills Classes Parenting Skills Classes * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Parenting Skills Classes * Parents of Children in Foster Care Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
